data.name: Test Track Park Trail
data.location: Berwick, Columbia County, Pennsylvania — starts off South Eaton Street near the Disc Golf Course; eastern trailhead off Ruhmels Lane
key_facts: Offers a picturesque view of the Susquehanna River North Branch
Benches are spaced along the path
Intersects with the Test Track Park boat access

data.name: Test Track Park
data.location: Berwick, Columbia County, Pennsylvania — accessible via I-80 to Berwick; features multiple parking areas off S Eaton St and an additional trailhead with parking off Ruhmels Lane
key_facts: Features multiple parking areas off S Eaton St
Additional trailhead located at the eastern edge of the park, off Ruhmels Lane, with a small parking area
Contains the Test Track Park Trail
Includes Test Track Park boat access
